lessons.title: Variables: Your Data Containers 📦
lessons.description: Learn to store and name data using let, const, and var.

lessons.title: Numbers & Math 🔢
lessons.description: Work with integers, decimals, and basic arithmetic.

lessons.title: Strings: Working with Text 📝
lessons.description: Create, combine, and explore text data in JavaScript.

lessons.title: Booleans & Null 🔘
lessons.description: Understand true/false values and the concept of nothingness.

lessons.title: Type Conversion & typeof 🔄
lessons.description: Convert between types and inspect what type your data is.
